title: MedlinePlus: MedlinePlus Connect: Email List
text:
zations or health IT providers to link patient portals or electronic health record (EHR) systems to MedlinePlus, an authoritative up-to-date health information resource for patients, families, and health care providers.
Join the MedlinePlus Connect discussion list to keep up with developments and exchange ideas with your colleagues. This email list will be useful for health IT developers and other interested users.
To subscribe to the list, send an email to LISTSERV@LIST.NIH.GOV with the following text in the message body:
Subscribe MEDLINEPLUSCONNECT Your First and Last Name 
For example: Subscribe MEDLINEPLUSCONNECT Jane Smith
Please tell us if you implement MedlinePlus Connect by
contacting us or posting to the email discussion list.
